INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('hElLo WoRlD'), ('CaseInsensitive Test'), ('Another Example');
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitive('Exact Match Here', ['Match', 'HERE']) AS index FROM test_strings;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitive(haystack, (SELECT arrayJoin(['World', 'hello'])) FROM test_strings) FROM test_strings;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(['World', 'Hello'])) AS needles SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitive(haystack, needles) FROM test_strings;
SELECT haystack, multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitive(haystack, ['mixedCase']) AS index FROM (SELECT DISTINCT haystack FROM test_strings) AS unique_strings;
